en.name: Yummy★Redemption
en.effect: Monsters your opponent controls lose 200 ATK for each LIGHT Beast monster you control and in your GY. Once per Chain, if you Synchro Summon a LIGHT Beast Synchro Monster: You can draw 1 card, then place 1 card from your hand on the bottom of the Deck. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Yummy" monster you control and 1 monster your opponent controls; switch control of both. You can only use this effect of "Yummy★Redemption" once per turn.

ja.name: ヤミー★リデンプション

zh-CN.name: 黯蜜★救赎
zh-CN.effect: 此卡名的③效果1回合仅可使用1次。①：对手场上的怪兽的攻击力下降自己场上・墓地的兽族・光属性怪兽数量×200的数值。②：自己将兽族・光属性同步怪兽同步召唤的情况下可以发动（同一连锁上最多1次）。自己抽1张。然后，挑选自己的1张手牌放回牌组最下面。③：将墓地的此卡除外，以自己场上的1只“黯蜜”怪兽和对手场上的1只怪兽为对象可以发动。该2只怪兽的控制权交换。
